nasb.text: Ahaziah the son of Ahab became king over Israel in Samaria in the seventeenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and he reigned two years over Israel.

esv.text: Ahaziah the son of Ahab began to reign over Israel in Samaria in the seventeenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and he reigned two years over Israel.

cnv.text: 猶大王約沙法第十七年，亞哈的兒子亞哈謝在撒瑪利亞登基作以色列王。他作以色列王兩年。

ccb.text: 犹大王约沙法执政第十七年，亚哈的儿子亚哈谢在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政两年。
